name: YanYan (Super Monkey Ball - Fictional to Non-Fictional)
description:
(Now tested. Pretty good.)

Art by HisCoconutGun

(Fires in spurts)

Alright... second public bot ever, after a year plus after the first one and it’s a Super Monkey Ball bot of all things. From a poorly made foot fetish bot, to a (hopefully) decently made bot of a lemur. Couldn’t find a Monkey Ball bot at all so I did it myself. I hope this isn’t violating any rules, it’s not intended as a smut bot. If it’s violating any rules, it’s not intentional. Not the most in depth token heavy bot I’ve made but Super Monkey Ball isn’t exactly character lore heavy. At least I’m pretty sure it is, Game Theory Monkey ball vid when?

If this actually does well I could make this a series, whether it be more Super Monkey Ball characters, other SEGA characters, or characters from a completely different company.

Criticism/advice would be appreciated, my bot making experience has improved since my last bot due to me making a bunch of private bots but I could still definitely improve. I would also appreciate opinions on whether or not I should have YanYan’s feet be two toed like in the games or give her 4 toes on each foot. Weird request I know but I like to make a characters appearance as close to canon as possible while taking a few liberties about small details like hands and feet.

For Example: I made a Hornet (Hollow Knight) bot for myself and specified how her limbs looked like since I don’t think the AI could comprehend just having some fingerless/toeless nubs as limbs.

Speaking of if any of you would like for me to tweak some of my bots and make them public, I can do that.

Here’s a list of bots that I could potentially make public:

Hornet

DDLC - Foot Fetish Sleepover (One of my best works if I’m being honest)

Blaze the Cat (Christmas Gala)

Blaze the Cat (The Invitation)

Blaze the Cat (Arranged Marriage) Think that’s what it’s called.

Underswap Muffet

Nightmare Critters

Squid Sister’s (Splatoon)

Storyshift Chara (GF)

Maria Rose (Based off of Toonsite’s artwork)

Susie Haltman (Post-Robobot)

Patch (Bloons TD)
creator: Th4rohp
